memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159
memoryArtifacts.description: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

zh.Beachley, Gloucestershire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾比亞利
zh.Wernddu, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根洛達
zh.Hertford, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾賀特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell於1274年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾利安洛維爾時，他的父親Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell19歲，母親Margaret Walsh19歲。他於1300年與Christian verch Gwarin Ddu在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1345年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾比亞利享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell于1274年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾利安洛維爾时，他的父亲Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell19岁，母亲Margaret Walsh19岁。他于1300年与Christian verch Gwarin Ddu在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1345年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾比亞利享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell was born in 1274, in Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Walsh, was 19. He married Christian verch Gwarin Ddu in 1300, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1345, in Beachley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.Wernddu, Wales: Rhondda, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell est né en 1274, à Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Walsh, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Christian verch Gwarin Ddu en 1300, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1345, à Beachley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell 1274 in Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Walsh 19. Er hat 1300 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Christian verch Gwarin Ddu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1345 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Beachley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell è nato il nel 1274 nel Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Walsh, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Christian verch Gwarin Ddu nel 1300, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1345, nel Beachley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowellが1274年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランロウエルで生まれた時，父Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowellは19歳，母Margaret Walshは19歳であった。1300年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでChristian verch Gwarin Dduと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1345年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビーチリーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell(이)가 1274년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜로월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Walsh(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1300년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Christian verch Gwarin Ddu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비클리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell nasceu em 1274, em Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Walsh, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian verch Gwarin Ddu em 1300, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1345, em Beachley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell родился в 1274 г. в местности лланллоуелл, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Walsh, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian verch Gwarin Ddu в 1300 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1345 г. в местности бичли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam FitzHerbert, Lord of Llanllowell nació en 1274, en Llanllowell, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Herbert FitzPeter, Lord of Llanlowell, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Walsh, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Christian verch Gwarin Ddu en 1300, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1345, en Beachley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
